name: JWT validation middleware (RS256/ES256)
acceptance_criteria: internal/api/middleware/auth.go exports an Echo middleware function
Validates JWT tokens signed with RS256 or ES256
Extracts dongle_id from token claims into Echo context
Returns 401 JSON error for missing, expired, or invalid tokens
Supports token via Authorization: Bearer header
Unit tests cover valid token, expired token, wrong algorithm, and missing token cases
go build and go vet pass cleanly
